description: Leading digital transformation initiatives for Southeast Asia's premier home goods distributor, developing production-ready platforms that serve thousands of customers across multiple countries.

overview.scale: 30+ global home brands distributed across Philippines, Singapore, and Malaysia
overview.marketLeadership: 34 years of excellence with 6 showrooms and 13 retail locations
overview.brandPortfolio: Premium brands including KitchenAid, Coleman, Levoit, Miele, Sub-Zero, Wolf, Sealy, Tempur
overview.businessModel: Premium brand distributor for consumer goods, home furnishings, and wellness products

responsibilities: Developed enterprise-scale platforms serving thousands of customers across multiple countries
Built all-in-one platforms managing over 25 brands across 3 countries with over $400K total revenue
Thrived in fast-paced innovation environment, quickly adopting modern technologies including TypeScript, NextJS, ShadCN, Python, FastAPI, AWS, and SST
Modernized legacy systems from C#/jQuery to TypeScript-based solutions
Effectively communicated technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders
Managed multi-tasking across maintenance tasks and innovation initiatives with frequent interdepartmental communication
Led the design and implementation of AWS infrastructure for internal HR system, using SST as an infrastructure-as-code framework to streamline provisioning and deployment
Guided small teams through ideation, design, and delivery of widely adopted applications
